# Vendored: @bjorn3/browser_wasi_shim

A browser WASI shim, vendored so the deployed game is self-contained and does
not depend on a CDN at runtime.

- Source: <https://github.com/bjorn3/browser_wasi_shim>
- Version: 0.3.0
- License: MIT OR Apache-2.0

These are the package's prebuilt `dist/*.js` ES modules, unmodified. To update,
replace them with a newer `dist/` and bump the version here.
